field.provenance: The exact Run-2 generated field plus its fielded original; generation was skipped so the run isolated judge execution policy.

verdict.notes: Every persisted sidecar reported worldcup-judge and no ordinary tools ran. Requests and token totals were lower than the Run-2 baseline, but the arms were not controlled for cache attribution and the cumulative Claude session limit interrupted 157 invocations and scheduled 37 zero-usage tiebreaks. Cost and quality are therefore both inconclusive; the champion/trust result is not evidence.
